outcome_summary: C1 of the issue close-out campaign per ~/.claude/plans/i-want-to-delay-sparkling-shell.md. Closed 4 Issues — #42 #43 #44 #45 — landing the S-0086 audit's scale-back verdict as a cohesive contract: ADR 0056 Consequences amendment; mempalace-operations.md 'Project usage scope' tighten with explicit retirement program; tagging-conventions.md room-targeting clarification (R8); discipline-enforced KG/tunnels/AAAK-for-project retirement (MCP-side filtering not feasible at the harness layer); 'Forward-fit map' subsection in health-check.md + TEMPLATE.md baking dual-temporal-frame discipline; mempalace_retired_surface_used soft-warn in validate.py with kg_calls/tunnel_calls rollup buckets in scan_mempalace_activity.py. 156 pytests pass; validator 0 hard-fails. Health-check cadence trigger explicitly deferred per user direction; health_check_overdue soft-warn fires every campaign session through C7. Next: C2 (S-0088) — #40 (cleanup) + #46 (wing-count guardrail) + #47 (audit-trail boot surface). mempalace_unavailable_acknowledged: MemPalace MCP server not connected to this conversation (only filesystem/supabase/figma MCPs surfaced as deferred tools); boot search ran via mempalace CLI (returned 6 substantive drawers including the S-0086 lesson + ADR 0056 decision drawer), but diary read/write are MCP-only — the post-tool-use hook captured zero MCP calls so the rollup will report all-zeroes. Documenting the gap per ADR 0056 escape hatch.
